author: DominicVainMod
content:
@everyone

Calico Shipit - Now Available

We just shipped the Calico Shipit! 

Following the MUD's ever-lasting demand for fast deliveries, the Calico Shipit is Galia's latest solution for quick and size-efficient freighting. As a launch offer, the first tranche of Shipits will be available at a discount of 25%.

Note: You can view the stats of all ships in SAGE Labs here: https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1cfzW3uiqkbnfJexBysh0MAzZYRhiRwQg8WlsFWfuKgs/edit#gid=205337066

 | Take your freighting to the next level: https://play.staratlas.com/market/SHiPitEZcCoyXEKqw9ovCdYeNzck9uVbb1KCcsHaGhc/
